lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: I am the Lady of the Lake.

lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: Aye, I have that artefact in my possession.

lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: 'Tis very valuable, and not an artefact to be given away lightly.

lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: ...But you have already proved thyself to be worthy of wielding it once already. I shall return it to you if you can prove yourself to still be worthy.

lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: Why, by proving yourself to be above material goods.

lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: 500 gold coins ought to do it.

lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: You are still worthy to wield Excalibur! And thanks for the cash! I felt like getting a new haircut!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that kind of money...

lines.speaker: The Lady of the Lake
lines.text: Well, come back when you do.
